$comment: Source data for scripts/import-resume.mjs. Converted from Dame's LinkedIn/resume PDF. Edit here, then re-run the importer to sync your PDS. Record keys (rkey) double as URL slugs and AT-URI tails. createdAt/updatedAt are stamped by the importer at write time. Light copyedits were applied to bullet text (grammar/typos only); numbers and facts are verbatim from the source.

highlights.text: Created anisota.net, an experimental social media app and independent interface for Bluesky inspired by card games, microblogging, and mindfulness.
Released Bluesky / ATProto projects that gained significant community attention, accumulating 100,000+ unique visitors and half a million page views since launch.
Provided content creation, brand strategy, and messaging services to various tech clients.
Wrote and published a long-form guide, "How to use Bluesky to grow your brand."
Spearheaded a new content strategy, boosting audience engagement by 45% and doubling link click-through rates.
Authored comprehensive guides demystifying decentralized technology for diverse audiences.
Managed multi-channel communications across social media, web content, newsletters, and a Discord community, ensuring message alignment and impact.
Increased organic Twitter following by 462% (8K to 45K followers) in six months through targeted educational content and live community engagement.
Wrote and managed comprehensive product education materials, including a complete user knowledge base.
Recruited the customer support team and provided hands-on training to align messaging and strategy across each member.
Led personalized 1:1 onboarding for influencers and celebrities, plus live group education for key audience segments.
Grew the audience by 200% leveraging engaging content and meme marketing strategies.
Launched the app on Product Hunt, driving a 400% increase in signups and reaching 196% of goal.
Oversaw marketing operations through HubSpot and Zapier.
Grew newsletter open rates by 10–15% through A/B testing subject lines.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to support product development.
Led communications strategy for five B2B SaaS healthcare brands, managing a $1M marketing budget and surpassing lead goals by 167%.
Managed a remote team that was the top-performing marketing team of the quarter multiple times in a row.
Handled crisis communications for a telehealth brand during the COVID-19 pandemic.
Revitalized corporate branding and website, significantly contributing to a 245% increase in ARR.
Executed high-impact campaigns, including a $2,000 direct-mail campaign that yielded $70,000 in new ARR.
Managed extensive HubSpot CRM automations and workflows.
Completed a major rebrand and revitalized messaging for a 30+ year old non-profit.
Provided marketing and design services to clients across the USA.
Handled business finances, contracts, and budgets.
Managed social and print communication channels to drive engagement with the church's audience, visitors, and stakeholders.
Served as editorial director and lead designer for a monthly print magazine.
Documented community events through photography and video production.
Documented local events, from weddings to community work days.
Captured high-quality portraits and headshots for professionals, graduates, and families.

resumes.title: Primary résumé
resumes.headline: Creative Technologist & Product Designer
resumes.summary: Creative technologist and product designer who builds independent social software on the AT Protocol and has spent a decade growing audiences, brands, and communities for tech companies. I work across the whole stack of making something people care about — product and design, content and brand strategy, and the marketing that carries it.

resumes.title: Product & design
resumes.headline: Product Designer & Creative Technologist
resumes.summary: Product designer and creative technologist focused on building and shipping independent social software, brands, and the content that introduces them. Selected, design-forward highlights from a decade of work.
